title: EPIPE write uncaught exception
rationale: EPIPE from cli-v2 stdout/stderr write escaped as an uncaught stream error; the PR swallows explicit EPIPE at the terminal logger I/O boundary while rethrowing other stream errors.
fixSummary: Added cli-v2 stdout/stderr EPIPE stream error handling in TtyAwareLogger.
problemSignature: Uncaught exception with EPIPE errno from stream write bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.
